creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Mikhail T. from comment #8)
>But I do think, expressing such -- very well deserved -- negative reaction 
>will help prevent future problems of this nature...

That's not how it works. Please feel free to use already installed PHP 7.4, migrate to Nextcloud, migrate to Linux or do what really suits your needs.  

The reason for dropping support for PHP 7.4 is clear to me. If you really care, you can probably maintain your local port for PHP 7.4 to 100% fulfil your needs.
